label: Asymmetric link border data
description: Color, size, and offset for a border overlay on an asymmetric link. Maps to Verse.AsymmetricLinkData.BorderData in RimWorld source.

color.label: Color
color.description: RGBA color of the border overlay. Defaults to black.

size.label: Size
size.description: Size of the border overlay as (width, height) in world units.

offset.label: Offset
offset.description: World-space offset of the border overlay as (x, y, z).
